metadata.title: Finleg
metadata.description: Financial and legal hassles — now united in a single AI platform.

hero.title: Finleg
hero.subtitle: Financial and legal hassles — now united in a single AI platform.

list.title: AI-Powered Insights
list.description: Leverage cutting-edge AI to navigate complex financial regulations and legal requirements with confidence.

list.title: Unified Platform
list.description: No more juggling between finance and legal tools. Everything you need, streamlined in one place.

list.title: Built for Speed
list.description: What used to take days now takes minutes. Automate compliance checks, contract reviews, and financial analysis.

mission.title: The future of finance and law is here.
mission.description: Finleg brings together the worlds of financial management and legal compliance into a single, intelligent platform — so you can focus on growing your business.

about.title: About Finleg
about.description: Our goal is to take the hassle out of legal and financial planning and management for a few select people.

history.title: Our Story
history.content: Finleg was born from a simple observation: AI is cool, and financial and legal stuff is never fun.

programs.title: Solutions
programs.description: Explore the tools and services Finleg offers.

list.title: Compliance Automation
list.description: Automate regulatory compliance across jurisdictions with AI-driven monitoring.

list.title: Contract Intelligence
list.description: AI-powered contract analysis, drafting, and risk assessment.

list.title: Financial Analytics
list.description: Real-time financial insights and reporting with built-in legal context.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with the Finleg team.
